subject: Pincehely church tower (close-up), 2015
context_for_lesson: Close-up architectural view of the Pincehely church tower — the central landmark of the village where Judy Abrams was hidden in 1944. Useful as supporting visual on a 'where Judy was hidden' page.
author: Globetrotter19
license_summary: CC BY-SA 4.0 — free to use, share, and adapt with attribution; derivative works must use the same license
lesson_use_intent: Optional supporting image for the Pincehely hiding place page. Pairs with the wider church-exterior view; or use alone if a tighter, more atmospheric shot is preferred.
concerns: None. License explicit, source Wikimedia Commons. Note: 2015 photo, not period — caption should clarify this shows the village TODAY.
